member-signin.title: Member Sign-In
member-signin.description: This is integrated sign-in for members. After signing in, you can access more information and services.
member-signin.sign_in_with_hyu_email: Sign in with Hanyang University Email

info_section.text_0: In accordance with Article 4 (Eligibility and Composition) of Chapter 2 of the Rules, the membership eligibility is limited to current, leave-of-absence, and alumni of Hanyang University. Therefore, we proceed with sign-in/sign-up through Hanyang University email. If you haven't created a Hanyang email yet,

help_section.title: Having trouble signing in?
help_section.text_4: Contact us via KakaoTalk Open Channel
help_section.text_5: and we'll assist you in logging into the service.

operator-signin.title: Operator Sign-In
operator-signin.description: This is integrated sign-in for operators. After signing in, you will be redirected to the operator page.
